DP.494.0000:
Despite the exploration team’s best
efforts, the rare, oddly colored
Pokémon eluded detection.
The rumored red GYARADOS failed to
appear to the dispirited team...
DP.494.0001:
That concludes our special report,
“Search for the Red GYARADOS!”\f
Brought to you by Jubilife TV on
Nationwide Net!\f
DP.494.0002:
See you next week, same time,
same channel!
DP.494.0003:
The TV is showing the title screen
of a video game.
DP.494.0004:
The X Button
opens the menu!
DP.494.0005:
It’s a Wii!
It’s controlled by a Wii Remote!
DP.494.0006:
[0103,0000] checked the PC.\f
Pokémon Basics...\f
People live alongside Pokémon in
this world.\f
The people that battle Pokémon are
called Pokémon Trainers.
